title: old and optimized
description: Optimises minecraft to run on older computers.
body:
this modpack aims to make minecraft run as fast as possible on low end/old systems. It should only be used on older pcs.

it's recommended to choose the 1.16.5 version, as it runs better and has more mods.


<details>
<summary>mods included (1.16.5)</summary>

- [Better Beds](https://modrinth.com/mod/kKwy3HU9) [1\.1\.0] by Motschen, TeamMidnightDust
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/LQ3K71Q1) [3\.9\.4] by juliand665, LostLuma
- [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/OVuFYfre) [0\.4] by FoundationGames
- [EntityCulling\-Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/NNAgCjsB) [1\.5\.2] by tr7zw
- [FPS Reducer](https://modrinth.com/mod/iZ10HXDj) [1\.24\-mc1\.16\.5] by bre2el
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/P7dR8mSH) [0\.42\.0\+1\.16] by FabricMC
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/uXXizFIs) [2\.1\.1] by malte0811
- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/fQEb0iXm) [0\.1\.2] by tuxed
- [LazyDFU](https://modrinth.com/mod/hvFnDODi) [0\.1\.2] by tuxed
- [Let Me Despawn](https://modrinth.com/mod/vE2FN5qn) [1\.3\.2c] by frikinjay
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/gvQqBUqZ) [0\.6\.6] by JellySquid
- [Memory Leak Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/NRjRiSSD) [1\.1\.5] by FX \- PR0CESS
- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/nmDcB62a) [5\.18\.0\+mc1\.16\.5] by embeddedt
- [Phosphor](https://modrinth.com/mod/hEOCdOgW) [0\.8\.0] by JellySquid, PhiPro
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/AANobbMI) [0\.2\.0\+build\.4] by JellySquid
- [retiNO](https://modrinth.com/mod/z7dmZ4nL) [1\.0\.1] by juliand665

</details>

# how do I install?

to install this modpack (or any modpack on modrinth), you'll need
1. a launcher which can install .mrpack files (most modern launchers)
2. that's basically it

here is the full image tutorial (for prism launcher/multimc)

<details>
<summary>guide</summary>

![step 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c906becb7e1d677c1aaf7386b51bd2bccba2b98.png)

![step 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f46d0244c87cccf349fc511e9f2471bba3cd1dba.png)
and then search for the modpack, and click download!
</details>

[download prism launcher](https://prismlauncher.org/)
